sqlCommands.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set Crcy = 'RSD' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy = 'CSD'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
Update TransX set BusCat = (case when substring(GL,1,2) in ('13') then 'A' else 'C' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat = '' or BusCat = 'XX')
Update TransX set Flex1 = 'I' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5) (Select '[batchID]',TTY,Descr,Active,BalFwd,Sgn from TTYS)
update TransX set Flex5 = m.Name from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex5 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.BusCat + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex9 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Co, GL, Crcy, Flex1, PC, CC, BusCat, TP,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6,Flex2) (select KeyID, YearPeriod, Co, GL, Crcy, Flex1, PC, CC, BusCat, TP, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt1+Amt2,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt3+Amt4,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt5,0)),2), round(sum(coalesce(Amt5+Amt6,0)),2),'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Co, GL, Crcy, Flex1, PC, CC, BusCat, TP)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,Amt1,Amt2,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GL,PC,Flex5,Flex6) (select KeyID, Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2),Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GL,PC,Flex5,Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GL,PC,Flex5,Flex6)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex2 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0  and Amt4 = 0 and Amt5 = 0 and Amt6 = 0
update x set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX x inner join COA c on x.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.PCdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update x set CCdesc = c.Descr from TransX x inner join Cctrs c on x.CC = c.Cctr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Amt1 = Amt5, Amt2 = Amt6, Amt3 = round(Amt5/c.Rate,2), Amt4 = round(Amt6/c.Rate,2), Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Flex1 and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Crcy, GL, TP, BusCat, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, Crcy, GL, TP, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, GL, TP, BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 is NULL or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0))
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = c.SAPname from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Ceded' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat in ('10','20','21','22','23','24') or GL like '13%')

Delete from IR17_Control_HudCAD where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R63' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_Control_HudCAD (YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,CC,CC_Desc,TP,ACD,Source,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Flex1,PC,PCdesc,CC,CCdesc,TP,BusCat,'R63',Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and substring(GL,1,3) in ('222','232')
Update x set Crcy = y.Field1 From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Swap' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '14%' or GL like '15%' or GL like '23%' or GL like '287%') and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '6%' or GL like '44%')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update x set Flex1 = y.Crcy from TransX x inner join Companies y on x.Co = y.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Crcy = Flex1, Amt1 = Amt3, Amt2 = Amt4 where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL like '132%'

Delete from IR17_Control where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R63' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_Control (YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,CC,CC_Desc,TP,ACD,Source,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Flex1,PC,PCdesc,CC,CCdesc,TP,BusCat,'R63',Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '

Delete from IR17_Control_Canada where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R63' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_Control_Canada (YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,CC,CC_Desc,TP,ACD,Source,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Flex1,PC,PCdesc,CC,CCdesc,TP,BusCat,'R63',Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '

Delete from IR17_Control_Singapore where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R63' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_Control_Singapore (YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC_Desc,CC,CC_Desc,TP,ACD,Source,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select YearPeriod,Co,GL,Crcy,Flex1,PC,PCdesc,CC,CCdesc,TP,BusCat,'R63',Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING'
Update TransX set Flex2 = (case when TTY = '806' then 'yes' else 'no' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.Flex6 = y.Typ, x.Flex9 = y.Product, x.Hierarchy = y.Hierarchy from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex6 = Hierarchy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex6,'') = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update x set x.Flex1 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on x.CC = y.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'G11'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set BusCat = '98' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '99'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,CC,Flex1,BusCat,Contract,ProdCode,Txt,Amt1) (select KeyID,'2450' as Co,GL,Flex1,CC,BusCat,Contract,ProdCode,'Reclass from ' + CC + ' to ' + Flex1 + ' @[Yr]/[Mo]' as Txt,Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
Update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1, Co = '2400', Txt = 'Reclass from ' + CC + ' to ' + Flex1 + ' @[Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,GL,PC,CC,TP,BusCat,Contract,ProdCode,Txt,Amt1) (select KeyID,Co,'1999901' as GL,(case when co = '2400' then '4024000000' else '4030000000' end) as PC,'' as CC,(case when co = '2400' then '2450' else '2400' end) as TP,'' as BusCat,'' as Contract,'' as ProdCode,'Inter-co for HSIC to HEIC exp reclass @[Yr]/[Mo]' as Txt,round(sum(-Amt1),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update TransX set GL = '2899901' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1999901' and Amt1 < 0
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
Update TransX set PK = (case when Amt1 > 0 then '40' else '50' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set TP = coalesce(TP,''), PC = coalesce(PC,''), Flex2 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
